name: Umesh Kumar K
intro: An IT Architect with 19+ years of experience leading the design and implementation of scalable, high-performance and secure web applications. Proven track record in executing complex legacy modernizations for enterprise systems, with the ability to build enterprise-grade GenAI integrations.
